user.title: Connect to Poco
user.description: Enter the hostname or IP address of your Poco lighting controller.

switches.title: Select switches
switches.description: Choose which Poco external switches to expose as lights in Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Poco device. Check the host and try again.
error.no_switches: No external switches found on this device.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Poco device is already configured.
